prestazioni: Replace the stock L540 5.2L naturally aspirated V10 (engine code: L540) with a Novitec Torado V10 Stage 3+ supercharger kit featuring a custom-built Rotrex C38-92 centrifugal supercharger, forged internals (CP pistons, Carrillo rods, and a billet crankshaft), and a bespoke Novitec ECU calibration targeting 850+ HP on 93 octane fuel with a 9,000 RPM redline and a 12 psi boost threshold

Install a full Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with 4.5-inch carbon-fiber tips, 304 stainless steel headers, and a secondary catalytic converter delete (for off-road use only), paired with a custom X-Pipe design to optimize scavenging and enhance the V10’s 8,000 RPM exhaust note

Upgrade the stock OEM Lamborghini rear-wheel steering system with a KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit (specifically valved for the Huracán Tecnica’s LDVA chassis), featuring 24-way rebound damping, adjustable camber plates, and a 30mm drop from stock ride height, paired with solid aluminum subframe bushings from 034 Motorsport to eliminate flex under hard cornering
estetica: Fit a full Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit for the Huracán Tecnica, including carbon-fiber front fenders with integrated air vents, a custom rear diffuser with dual exhaust cutouts, and a 50mm extended rear bumper to accommodate the Akrapović exhaust system while maintaining OEM+ fitment

Replace the stock 20-inch wheels with a set of HRE FF01 forged wheels in a staggered 20x9.5 ET35 front and 20x12.5 ET45 rear configuration, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30/20 front, 335/25/20 rear) for maximum mechanical grip, paired with a custom gold/polished finish and Lamborghini-centric center caps

Install a custom carbon-fiber engine cover from Vorsteiner, featuring a clear-coated weave with exposed carbon-fiber air intakes, a laser-etched Lamborghini logo, and integrated LED lighting to highlight the Novitec supercharger setup, paired with a full carbon-fiber interior trim kit from iND Distribution, including a custom Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel with red stitching and a Novitec-branded shift knob
